title: Umami Glitter Curry
description: A show-off Chinese dish featuring Thai green curry paste with umami flavors and a flaky texture, made without nuts for a nut-free-friendly option.

ingredients.name: Coconut Milk
ingredients.notes: Organic and low-fat for healthier option

ingredients.name: Sugar
ingredients.notes: For sweetness to balance the umami flavors

ingredients.name: Thai Fish (or other firm white fish)
Fresh Lemongrass
ingredients.notes: To add freshness and umami flavor

instructions: Heat a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat. Add coconut milk to the wok.
Season with Thai Green Curry Paste, Fish Sauce, and Sugar. Stir well until all ingredients are evenly distributed in the coconut milk.
Add fish pieces to the curry sauce. Cover the pan with a lid and cook for about 5 minutes on each side or until fish is cooked through.
Remove fish from the pan and set aside. Keep cooking the sauce for another minute, then stir in minced green onions and lemongrass.
Return the fish pieces to the pan along with any accumulated juices that may have formed during cooking. Cook for an additional 2 minutes or until heated evenly throughout.
Garnish with fresh green onions before serving.
